package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for service_method_accepts_map_string_any_input: Services that use map-shaped dynamic input instead of typed request contracts.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule169NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule169NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule169NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario169Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule169NegativeService, input Rule169NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
